name: Atom
description: Electron shells whirling around golden nuclei — both orbits spin to new inclinations on every redraw.

code.style: --spin1: @rand(360deg); --spin2: @rand(360deg); --orb: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: radial-gradient(circle, var(--color1) 0 5%, transparent 5.5%); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; top: 33%; width: 72%; height: 34%; border: calc(20px / @Y) solid var(--orb); border-radius: 50%; transform: rotate(var(--spin1)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; top: 33%; width: 72%; height: 34%; border: calc(20px / @Y) solid var(--color5); border-radius: 50%; transform: rotate(var(--spin2)); opacity: 0.7; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
